Output records open ambiguity instead of silently choosing behavior.

evals.name: plan-rejects-speculative-abstraction
evals.prompt: Run /forgeflow:ff-plan for a brief that asks for one simple discount function in one existing billing module. Produce Design Intent, Simplicity Check, and one task only.
evals.expected_output: A plan fragment that chooses the minimal implementation, explicitly rejects unnecessary strategy/class hierarchy or future configurability, and keeps the task scope surgical with verification.

assertions.text: Output includes the Simplicity Check section.
Output rejects speculative abstraction or flexibility.
Output includes surgical scope or focused files.

evals.name: review-catches-drive-by-refactor
evals.prompt: Run /forgeflow:ff-review on a task whose plan names one validation file, but the diff also reformats unrelated modules and extracts a helper not required by the acceptance criteria. Produce Findings and Next Action only.
evals.expected_output: A review fragment that reports scope creep or drive-by refactor, flags overengineering if the helper is speculative, and sends remediation back to execute instead of approving silently.

assertions.text: Output flags scope creep or drive-by refactor.
Output can flag overengineering for speculative helper extraction.
Output includes a next action that returns remediation to execute.
